steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: Subtract $7x$ from both sides of $7x+4=7x+10$: $$4=10.$$ This is false for every $x$.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: The equation simplifies to a contradiction, not to a true statement or a single value of $x$. Therefore, no value of $x$ can make the original equation true. There are zero solutions, so A is correct.
